\tzpentry{ID4307}{Magnetic Flux Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4307 introduces Magnetic Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\Phi = n \cdot (h/2e) \approx n \cdot 2.07 \times 10^{-15} \text{ Wb}$
\]
